name: Rick Santorum for President
subject: The winner is….
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
body:
| [ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=radio_ad_winner&n=1)
---
Friend --
**We Have a Winner!** I asked our supporters to vote on which radio spot we should run first, and the response was overwhelming. The winner was “Take Back America”, which you can listen to [here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsoundcloud.com%2Fsantorumforpresident%2Ftake-back-america-radio-ad&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=radio_ad_winner&n=2). The reaction to this ad has been nothing short of remarkable. So positive, we have decided to begin running the ad nationally and in key targeted states. It’s critical voters, far and wide, hear my message for taking back America for hardworking families.

**Will You Pay for Just One Ad?****

** $55. That’s all it will cost for our ad to run one time in important early states like Iowa. Just $55! Can I count on you to make a $55 contribution right now? [](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/help_us_run_our_ad?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=radio_ad_winner&n=3) I want to thank you in advance for your contribution. This should help us gain valuable momentum heading into the next Presidential debate. Rick Santorum for President [http://www.ricksantorum.com/](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=radio_ad_winner&n=4)

[ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=radio_ad_winner&n=5)
Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=radio_ad_winner&n=6).
You can also keep up with Rick Santorum for President on [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=radio_ad_winner&n=7) or [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=radio_ad_winner&n=8).

name: Rand Paul
subject: The chief culprit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

The Federal Reserve's printing press provides the fuel that powers the Washington Machine.

All the bailouts. All the crony capitalism and insider deals. All the trillions in debt.

All made possible because of the unaccountable Federal Reserve.

**[Will you add your name to the fight to Audit the Fed](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29843922:28609387059:m:1:879035888:20BFA650578FE26FBA5C3FCB2F0E2DF8:r)**?

Before the Senate left for August recess, I introduced Audit the Fed as an amendment to the Cyber-security Bill.

And I will not rest until my colleagues are forced to stand in front of the American people and cast a vote on this vital legislation.

Fellow Conservative, I didn't run for the Senate to keep a seat warm.

And I didn't enter this race just to be something.

I'm running for President of the United States to defeat the Washington Machine and take our country back.

And that means busting through the unholy alliance of the Big Government politicians in BOTH parties who sat on their hands because the Fed "kept the good times rolling."

You and I saw the results of an unchecked central bank when the Fed-generated bubble exploded in 2008 and wrecked our economy.

Ever since, our economy has been spinning its wheels as wages have stagnated and every day Americans feel the pinch as paychecks are stretched to the breaking point.

But times were good for the well-connected as the Fed created money out of thin air to fund Big Government boondoggles like the bailouts and the failed Obama stimulus package.

The status quo has failed too many Americans and I won't sit idly by.

Changing Washington starts with forcing the Fed to open its books.

It starts with slamming the breaks on the Fed's ability to increase the money supply and devalue the dollar while allowing Big Government to borrow trillions.

And it starts with Congress passing Audit the Fed.

Fellow Conservative, I believe this is a fight you and I can win.

I'm the only candidate to lead Hillary Clinton in five states won by Barack Obama because voters know I don't just brag about defeating the Washington Machine on the campaign trail, I have a proven record of fighting to upend the status quo.

**[So I hope I can count on you to add your name to the fight by completing your"Audit the Fed NOW" petition](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29843922:28609387059:m:1:879035888:20BFA650578FE26FBA5C3FCB2F0E2DF8:r)**.

And after you fill out your petition, **[please chip in a contribution](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29843922:28609387059:m:1:879035888:20BFA650578FE26FBA5C3FCB2F0E2DF8:r)** so I can continue to fight tooth-and-nail to break the Federal Reserve's print-borrow-and-spend cycle of economic disaster.
| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29843923:28609387059:m:1:879035888:20BFA650578FE26FBA5C3FCB2F0E2DF8:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29843924:28609387059:m:1:879035888:20BFA650578FE26FBA5C3FCB2F0E2DF8:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29843925:28609387059:m:1:879035888:20BFA650578FE26FBA5C3FCB2F0E2DF8:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29843926:28609387059:m:1:879035888:20BFA650578FE26FBA5C3FCB2F0E2DF8:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29843922:28609387059:m:1:879035888:20BFA650578FE26FBA5C3FCB2F0E2DF8:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29843922:28609387059:m:1:879035888:20BFA650578FE26FBA5C3FCB2F0E2DF8:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29843927:28609387059:m:1:879035888:20BFA650578FE26FBA5C3FCB2F0E2DF8:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29843928:28609387059:m:1:879035888:20BFA650578FE26FBA5C3FCB2F0E2DF8:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29843929:28609387059:m:1:879035888:20BFA650578FE26FBA5C3FCB2F0E2DF8:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Christian Ferry, Campaign Manager, Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: Want a Bumper Sticker?
body:
| |

---
---
|
Friend,

Can I put some bumper stickers in the mail to you today?

Let me explain. Our campaign just printed thousands of bumper stickers, and I want to send you a few so you can show your support for Senator Graham on your vehicle!

After your vehicle is appropriately sporting a #Graham2016 sticker, I hope you will distribute a few extra to your friends and family.

**Your donation of at least $10 will help us cover the printing and shipping costs.[Please follow this link to chip in $10 or more and we will put 5 stickers in the mail to you right away!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29847174:28611118744:m:1:877327319:ADC11D38A2753D283A4B148B4C881107:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29847174:28611118744:m:1:877327319:ADC11D38A2753D283A4B148B4C881107:r)
Senator Graham is ready to be Commander-in-Chief on day one and with your immediate support he will win our party's nomination. [**Will you show your support for Senator Graham by chipping in $10 or more right now?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29847174:28611118744:m:1:877327319:ADC11D38A2753D283A4B148B4C881107:r)

Christian Ferry
Campaign Manager
Lindsey Graham 2016

P.S. Senator Graham is ready to lead on day one, but he won't be able to get to the White House without your support. [**Your immediate donation of $10 or more will allow our campaign to share Senator Graham's message of strength and security with people in the early voting states of Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina. Plus, we will mail you a package of 5 bumper stickers when you make an instant donation right now!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29847174:28611118744:m:1:877327319:ADC11D38A2753D283A4B148B4C881107:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29847174:28611118744:m:1:877327319:ADC11D38A2753D283A4B148B4C881107:r) |

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

name: John Weaver
subject: Momentum is Growing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[

](www.JohnKasich.com)
Peter, we're off to a great start and Gov. John Kasich is gaining momentum.

**Watch our latest web video and please share it:

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29849792:28613871795:m:1:958431888:F405A73E4BB602430C6AA19496D905BF:r)**
**[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29849793:28613871795:m:1:958431888:F405A73E4BB602430C6AA19496D905BF:r)
**

The latest New Hampshire poll had Gov. Kasich in 3rd place and only 1-point behind Jeb Bush. [Chip in to help keep the momentum going!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29849794:28613871795:m:1:958431888:F405A73E4BB602430C6AA19496D905BF:r)

**Here are some other updates from this week:**

**1.** Alabama Governor Robert Bentley endorsed Gov. Kasich for President. ([Read more](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29849795:28613871795:m:1:958431888:F405A73E4BB602430C6AA19496D905BF:r))

**2.** Gov. Kasich signed paperwork to appear on the South Carolina primary ballot.

**3.** While in South Carolina, Gov. Kasich spoke at a forum about how we can make America safer & stronger. ([Read more](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29849796:28613871795:m:1:958431888:F405A73E4BB602430C6AA19496D905BF:r))

**4.** Gov. Kasich also spent Tuesday at the Iowa State Fair. ([Read more](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29849797:28613871795:m:1:958431888:F405A73E4BB602430C6AA19496D905BF:r))

**Peter, with your help, we can keep up the momentum!**

[Please consider chipping in $25, $50 or more right now to help!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29849798:28613871795:m:1:958431888:F405A73E4BB602430C6AA19496D905BF:r)

Thank you for all that you're doing.

**John Weaver
**Chief Strategist

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29849798:28613871795:m:1:958431888:F405A73E4BB602430C6AA19496D905BF:r)

name: Scott Walker
subject: Peter, sign on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Walker Inc
body:
Peter, you don’t want it, and I want to tell you, you don’t have to keep it. ObamaCare is a disaster and our next president must commit to repealing and replacing it with a plan that will work for all Americans. It’s no surprise when designing a healthcare plan, big government bureaucrats created one around Washington, not consumers.
| [](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMzMDQ4MTIS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIxODI4Mjg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Peter, you don’t want it, and I want to tell you, you don’t have to keep it. ObamaCare is a disaster and our next president must commit to repealing and replacing it with a plan that will work for all Americans. It’s no surprise when designing a healthcare plan, big government bureaucrats created one around Washington, not consumers. This backwards approach has increased health care costs and reduced access to medical care. My hope is you will become an **Inaugural Sponsor of my Day One Patient Freedom Plan** and show the Washington establishment Americans are ready for a health care plan that put patients and doctors in charge. **[With your special Inaugural Sponsor contribution of $15, $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 you will show Obama his plan is a mess and show Hillary we’ve had enough.](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMzMDQ4MTIS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIxODI4Mjg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)** ObamaCare was a classic bait and switch. One of the chief architects even said the lack of transparency helped pass the law. **OBAMACARE WAS BAD...HILLARYCARE WILL BE WORSE.** If Hillary is elected president, Americans can expect proposals similar to Europe’s single-payer system, including federal price controls and further restrictions on private sector innovation in the healthcare industry. My plan will:
1. Repeal ObamaCare in its entirety.
2. Empower individuals by increasing coverage options for Americans and their families.
3. Empower states by taking control out of Washington.
4. Provide financial stability for families and taxpayers.

Peter, with you as an **Inaugural Sponsor of my Day One Patient Freedom Plan** we can stop Hillary from getting back into the White House and finally fully repeal the train wreck that is ObamaCare. **[Take the power away from the Washington bureaucrats today with a gift of $15, $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000.](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMzMDQ4MTIS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIxODI4Mjg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)** Thank you, Scott Walker [Stop Hillary](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjMzMDQ4MTIS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIxODI4Mjg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjMzMDQ4MTIS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIxODI4Mjg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjMzMDQ4MTIS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIxODI4Mjg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
| Paid for by Scott Walker Inc.
[www.ScottWalker.com](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMzMDQ4MTIS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjIxODI4Mjg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
This email was sent by: Scott Walker Inc.
P.O. Box 620590, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Unfair, grotesque and exploitative
body:
#
[**Endorse Bernie's plan to take on Wall Street, break up the big banks, and restore sanity to our financial system.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23bf/43f17890/5a33b9d2/621d2e28/2043650974/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/break-up-the-banks?source=em150819full")
Friend -
Wall Street's greed, recklessness, and illegal behavior drove this country into the worst recession since the Great Depression. For too long, this billionaire class has corrupted our political system. We must act decisively to make our economy fair again.
Wall Street's dangerous manipulation of our economy has helped divert most of all new income to the top one percent, contributing to the most unequal level of wealth and income distribution of any major country on earth.
Today, we live in the richest country in the history of the world, but that reality means little because much of that wealth is controlled by a tiny handful of individuals. The skyrocketing level of income and wealth inequality is not only grotesque and immoral, it is economically unsustainable.
The reality is that for the past 40 years, Wall Street and the billionaire class have rigged the rules to redistribute wealth and income to the wealthiest and most powerful people in this country. As a result, Wall Street exists as an island unto itself, benefiting only the extremely wealthy while using our money to get rich.
[**That ends when I am president. Let me tell you what I'm going to do, then sign on to endorse my plan to take on Wall Street.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23bf/43f17890/5a33b9d2/621d2e28/2043650974/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/break-up-the-banks?source=em150819full")
**Tax Wall Street Speculation to Make College Tuition Free**
Too many firms on Wall Street using high-speed trading to try to make a quick buck. But it's risky and unproductive. Banks can execute thousands of stock trades a second thanks to sophisticated computer algorithms.
Wall Street can keep doing this if it wants--but they'll have to pay a tax on every one of those trades. And this tax on Wall Street speculation would be enough to pay for my plan to make tuition free at every public college or university.
**Break Up Banks that are Too Big to Fail**
In the midst of all of this grotesque inequality in our country sits a handful of financial institutions that are still so large, the failure of any one would cause catastrophic risk to millions of Americans and send the world economy into crisis.
Most of the major Wall Street financial institutions that we bailed out because they were "too big to fail" are now bigger than they used to be. The six largest financial institutions now have assets equivalent to nearly 60% of our GDP, issue 35% of the mortgages, and oversee 65% of credit cards.
My view: If it's too big to fail, it's too big to exist. That's the bottom line. As president, I will break up the big banks and restore some sanity to our banking system.
**Make Banking Boring: Reign in the Recklessness**
Banking should be boring. It shouldn't be about making as much profit as possible by gambling on esoteric financial products. The goal of banking should be to provide affordable loans to small and medium-sized businesses in the productive economy, and to Americans who need to purchase homes and cars.
That is not what these huge financial institutions are doing. They're instead creating an economy which is not sustainable from a moral, economic, or political perspective. It's a rigged economy that must be changed in fundamental ways.
We need banks that invest in the job-creating productive economy. We do not need more speculation with the American economy hanging in the balance.
**Unrig the Tax System**
Our tax system is wildly unfair -- rigged to benefit the very rich. Major corporations that earn billions in profits stash their money in tax havens and pay nothing in federal income taxes, while billionaire hedge fund managers pay a lower effective tax rate than nurses or teachers.
In order to reverse the massive transfer of wealth and income from the middle class to the very rich that we have seen in recent years, we need real tax reform which makes the wealthy and profitable corporations begin to pay their fair share of taxes. It is fiscally irresponsible that the U.S. Treasury loses about $100 billion a year because corporations and the rich stash their profits in the Cayman Islands, Bermuda and other tax havens.
We need a tax system which is fair and progressive. Children should not go hungry in this country while profitable corporations and the wealthy avoid their tax responsibilities.
**We Can Do This**
The issue of wealth and income inequality is the great moral issue of our time, it is the great economic issue of our time, and it is the great political issue of our time.
I can understand how this might feel daunting. We are up against a billionaire class that has bought our political system to enrich itself, and is now faced with the breakup of their oligarchy.
Know this: when people come together to organize, we can beat any amount of money thrown around by the Koch Brothers, Goldman Sachs executives, or anyone else.
Our political revolution is underway, and when it is built, we will win not just against Wall Street, but we will win the White House.
[**Add your name to endorse my plan to take on Wall Street and the billionaire class.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23bf/43f17890/5a33b9d2/621d2e28/2043650974/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/break-up-the-banks?source=em150819full")
We can do this, Friend. Thank you for standing with us.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23bf/43f17890/5a33b9d2/621d2e29/2043650974/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?source=em150819full")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23bf/43f17890/5a33b9d2/621d2dd6/2043650974/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23bf/43f17890/5a33b9d2/621d2dd7/2043650974/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23bf/43f17890/5a33b9d2/621d2dd4/2043650974/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb23bf/43f17890/5a33b9d2/621d2dd5/2043650974/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

For too long, this billionaire class has corrupted our political system. We must act decisively to make our economy fair again. Wall Street's dangerous manipulation of our economy has helped divert most of all new income to the top one percent, contributing to the most unequal level of wealth and income distribution of any major country on earth. Today, we live in the richest country in the history of the world, but that reality means little because much of that wealth is controlled by a tiny handful of individuals. The skyrocketing level of income and wealth inequality is not only grotesque and immoral, it is economically unsustainable. The reality is that for the past 40 years, Wall Street and the billionaire class have rigged the rules to redistribute wealth and income to the wealthiest and most powerful people in this country. As a result, Wall Street exists as an island unto itself, benefiting only the extremely wealthy while using our money to get rich. I'm asking you to pitch in to help build this campaign today -- even if it's just $1 -- and put your name on our brand new Donor Wall here at campaign HQ.

name: Rick Santorum
subject: It’s time to prosecute Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
body:
| [ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1007&n=1)
---
Friend --

Today, another horrific video of Planned Parenthood’s total disregard for the dignity of human life was released by the Center for Medical Progress. In the video, Planned Parenthood employees describe “harvesting” the brain of a living, delivered baby.

**What Planned Parenthood is doing is called a partial-birth abortion, and it is illegal. I know the law, because I wrote it. And Planned Parenthood needs to be prosecuted under federal law for these barbaric and illegal practices.**

[](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/prosecute_planned_parenthood_donate?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1007&n=2)
I don’t believe that life begins at conception. _I know life begins at conception.**That’s the truth.**_

Our movement is founded on that truth: that every human life—no matter how small—has inherent dignity. And in the wake of these recent Planned Parenthood videos, that’s a truth that more and more Americans are recognizing.

As I travel across the nation, I’m speaking this truth to everyone who’ll listen. But to spread our message further, I need your help.

**[Can you chip in $1—or whatever you can—to help me share our message about these awful crimes that Planned Parenthood is committing against innocent human life?](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/prosecute_planned_parenthood_donate?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1007&n=3)**

Too many of our fellow citizens are turning a blind eye to these barbaric practices. If we don’t get the word out, Planned Parenthood will never be held to account for their actions.

Thank you for your support.

_\-- Rick Santorum_

[ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contribute?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1007&n=4)

Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1007&n=5).
You can also keep up with Rick Santorum for President on [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1007&n=6) or [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1007&n=7).

name: Sam Smith
subject: "The Conservative Case For Chris Christie"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
|
---
| |
---|---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43502011:18748958279:m:1:1516426255:F3710C5AA878BEEDD0F928F3047966CD:r) |
| | | Peter - Over the last few days, Governor Christie has been discussing a number of important issues facing our country on FOX News and CNN. **** First, he took on Secretary Clinton's "breathtaking" arrogance when it comes to being transparent and accountable as a leader. Governor Christie also called the handling of her email scandal "the typical approach of the Clintons" to "blame everyone else" when faced with trouble.

> **[WATCH: Hillary Clinton's Arrogance Is Breathtaking](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43502012:18748958279:m:1:1516426255:F3710C5AA878BEEDD0F928F3047966CD:r)**
>
On The O'Reilly Factor last night, Governor Christie once again talked about this President's failure to enforce the laws on the books, and encourages lawlessness especially when it comes to sanctuary cities.
> **[WATCH: This President Encourages Lawlessness](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43502013:18748958279:m:1:1516426255:F3710C5AA878BEEDD0F928F3047966CD:r)**
Also, in an op-ed for Forbes, Patrick Gleason laid out the conservative case for Chris Christie.
> **[READ: The Conservative Case For Chris Christie](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43502014:18748958279:m:1:1516426255:F3710C5AA878BEEDD0F928F3047966CD:r)**
>
Finally, in news from New Hampshire today, prominent business leaders Dick Anagnost and Bill Greiner endorsed Chris Christie for President.
> **[READ: Dick Anagnost, Bill Greiner endorse Chris Christie](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43502015:18748958279:m:1:1516426255:F3710C5AA878BEEDD0F928F3047966CD:r)**
Following the next two days in New Hampshire, Governor Christie will head to the Iowa State Fair this weekend. Thanks, Sam Smith
Communications Director [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43502011:18748958279:m:1:1516426255:F3710C5AA878BEEDD0F928F3047966CD:r)

name: Sheila O'Connell, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: background checks (action needed)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Did you see Chris's email, friend?

Background checks for all gun sales are a crucial tool in reducing gun violence - but Congress has refused to act.

**[Will you join Chris and stand up for expanded background checks? Add your name now.>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f7c/70cdc2ba/4798c86a/395008c/3834181696/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-up-for-background-checks")**

Thanks - this is an issue worth fighting for.

Sheila O'Connell
Campaign Manager
Van Hollen for Senate

\----Original Message---- NEW PEW POLL: 85% of Americans Support Background Checks
**[Sign Here To Demand Congress Act Now To Reduce Gun Violence ](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f7c/70cdc2ba/4798c86a/395008c/3834181696/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-up-for-background-checks")** Friend, A new poll from The Pew Research Center shows that **85% of Americans support expanding background checks** to cover sales from private owners and at gun shows. That's an overwhelming majority, and yet Congress continues to kowtow to the NRA and the gun lobby, refusing to take action.

As gun violence continues to plague our communities, we can't stand by and do nothing.

**What we need is a little more common sense and political courage in Washington. Congress needs to act.**

[_**Add your name: Demand Congress put public safety before the NRA and act now on background checks.**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f7c/70cdc2ba/4798c86a/395008c/3834181696/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-up-for-background-checks")

As Maryland's next U.S. Senator, I'll continue to fight for effective solutions to keep guns out of the wrong hands. This year I've introduced the Handgun Purchaser Licensing Act, which would offer incentives for states to implement laws, like we have here in Maryland, that require a license to purchase a handgun -- the same way we need a license to drive a car or fish in a river.

The cost of inaction on this issue is simply too high. **Join me and help send a message that Americans are tired of waiting for action to end gun violence.**

[_**Call on Congress to act on background checks on all gun sales: add your name now. >>**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f7c/70cdc2ba/4798c86a/395008c/3834181696/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-up-for-background-checks")

Thanks for stepping up.

Chris

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f7c/70cdc2ba/4798c86a/395008d/3834181696/VEsD/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Mike Huckabee - Personal
subject: I'm in Israel right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Huckabee for President
body:
| Friend, I have been in Israel the past few days and this morning I met with Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu in Jerusalem. He is a Churchill in a world full of Chamberlains. I have had a number of other meetings while I have been here and I am convinced, now more than ever, that the dangerous nuclear deal with Iran must be stopped. As President, I will confront and stop Iran - this Administration’s willingness to trust Iran and undermine Israel is unprecedented and wrong. Will you stand with me so the United States can once again lead with moral clarity and stand up to evil? clean_body: | Friend, I have been in Israel the past few days and this morning I met with Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu in Jerusalem. He is a Churchill in a world full of Chamberlains. I have had a number of other meetings while I have been here and I am convinced, now more than ever, that the dangerous nuclear deal with Iran must be stopped. As President, I will confront and stop Iran - this Administration’s willingness to trust Iran and undermine Israel is unprecedented and wrong. Will you stand with me so the United States can once again lead with moral clarity and stand up to evil? Thank you, Mike Huckabee Sent from my iPad Paid for by Huckabee for President | | * This e-mail was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Mike Huckabee for President Huckabee for President PO Box 3357 Little Rock, AR 72203 Phone: 1-844-780-6785 Fax: N/A
